summary: Iteration 15 testing completed successfully. Verified hardening of Batch Scanner, AI Signals, and Track Record features. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend pages (BatchScanner, SignalDashboard, TrackRecord) load correctly with all expected UI elements.
passed_tests: Backend: _validate_signal_bounds correctly fixes BUY target below entry (adjusts upward to entry*1.02)
Backend: _validate_signal_bounds correctly fixes BUY stop-loss above entry (adjusts downward to entry*0.95)
Backend: _validate_signal_bounds correctly fixes SELL target above entry (adjusts downward to entry*0.98)
Backend: _validate_signal_bounds correctly fixes SELL stop-loss below entry (adjusts upward to entry*1.05)
Backend: confidence clamped to 10-95 range (200 -> 95, 5 -> 10)
Backend: horizon_days clamped to 1-90 range (500 -> 90, 0 -> 1)
Backend: risk_reward_ratio computed from validated targets/stops (format 1:X.XX)
Backend: _safe_float handles NaN/Inf/None/invalid values correctly
Backend: GET /api/signals/track-record returns data_quality field with status/closed_count/stale_open_signals/zero_return_closed
Backend: Track record metrics are sanitized (no NaN/Inf in metrics/equity_curve/by_action/by_sector/by_confidence/streaks)
Backend: GET /api/signals/active returns sanitized signals with live_return_pct (no NaN/Inf)
Backend: GET /api/signals/learning-context returns properly with total_signals field
Backend: build_shortlist uses ThreadPoolExecutor with per-stock timeout
Backend: god_mode_scan has asyncio.wait_for with 120s timeout on LLM ensemble
Backend: build_shortlist imports and uses validate_fundamentals/validate_technical from portfolio_hardening
Backend: god_mode_scan attaches factor_score to shortlist results using compute_factor_score
Backend: validate_fundamentals sanitizes impossible values (NaN pe_ratio, Inf roe, 500% dividend_yield, negative D/E, beta=100)
Backend: validate_fundamentals preserves valid values (pe_ratio=25.5, roe=18.3, dividend_yield=2.5, D/E=45, beta=1.2)
Backend: validate_technical sanitizes RSI values (RSI>100 -> None, NaN -> None, valid 65.5 preserved)
Backend: _sf sanitizer in performance_service handles NaN/Inf/None/invalid and rounds to 2 decimals
Backend: signals.py has _sanitize_dict/_sanitize_float functions for JSON safety
Backend: _gather_raw_data uses validate_fundamentals/validate_technical from portfolio_hardening
Frontend: BatchScanner page loads with data-testid='batch-scanner-page'
Frontend: BatchScanner shows 'God Mode Scanner' title and 'Launch God Scan' button
Frontend: BatchScanner shows SEBI disclaimer
Frontend: SignalDashboard page loads with data-testid='signal-dashboard-page'
Frontend: SignalDashboard shows Active signals tab with 10 active signals
Frontend: SignalDashboard shows Win Rate (50%), Total Signals (6), Avg Return (32.88%)
Frontend: SignalDashboard shows Evaluate All and Generate Signal buttons
Frontend: TrackRecord page loads with data-testid='track-record-page'
Frontend: TrackRecord shows metrics: Win Rate (50%), Expectancy (32.89%), Profit Factor (2.92), Avg Win (+100%), Avg Loss (-34.23%)
Frontend: TrackRecord shows Equity Curve chart with cumulative returns
Frontend: TrackRecord shows Performance by Sector and Performance by Confidence Band breakdowns
Frontend: TrackRecord shows SEBI disclaimer
critical_code_review_comments: Signal validation (_validate_signal_bounds) correctly enforces: BUY targets above entry, BUY stops below entry, SELL targets below entry, SELL stops above entry
Confidence clamped to 10-95 range prevents LLM hallucination of extreme confidence values
Horizon days clamped to 1-90 prevents unrealistic time horizons
Target prices capped at ±30% from entry prevents moonshot hallucinations
Stop-loss enforced max 15% distance prevents unrealistic risk parameters
Risk/reward ratio computed from validated (not raw) targets/stops ensures accurate metrics
ThreadPoolExecutor with per-stock 8s timeout in build_shortlist prevents infinite hangs on slow yfinance calls
asyncio.wait_for with 120s timeout on LLM ensemble prevents god_mode_scan from running forever
validate_fundamentals sanitizes yfinance garbage: NaN/Inf values, impossible dividend yields (>20%), negative D/E, extreme beta
_sf sanitizer in performance_service ensures track record metrics are JSON-safe (no NaN/Inf)
_sanitize_dict in signals.py recursively sanitizes nested structures for JSON serialization
data_quality field in track record provides transparency on data reliability (status, closed_count, stale_open_signals, zero_return_closed)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 3 pages load correctly with expected elements)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 verified the hardening of three features: (1) Batch Scanner - ThreadPoolExecutor with per-stock 8s timeout, asyncio.wait_for 120s timeout on LLM ensemble, validate_fundamentals/validate_technical applied, factor_score attached. (2) AI Signal Dashboard - _validate_signal_bounds enforces entry/target/stop-loss relationships, confidence clamped 10-95, horizon_days clamped 1-90, risk_reward_ratio computed from validated values. (3) Track Record - _sf sanitizer for NaN/Inf, data_quality field with status/closed_count/stale_open_signals/zero_return_closed. All validation functions tested directly via pytest imports. Frontend pages verified via Playwright.

features: ThreadPoolExecutor with max_workers=5 for parallel stock fetching
Per-stock timeout of 8s via future.result(timeout=8)
Overall batch timeout of 90s via as_completed(timeout=90)
asyncio.wait_for(timeout=120) on LLM ensemble in god_mode_scan
validate_fundamentals() applied to yfinance fundamental data
validate_technical() applied to technical analysis data
compute_factor_score() attached to shortlist results
_validate_signal_bounds() enforces entry/target/stop-loss relationships
BUY: target must be > entry (adjusted to entry*1.02 if below)
BUY: stop must be < entry (adjusted to entry*0.95 if above)
SELL: target must be < entry (adjusted to entry*0.98 if above)
SELL: stop must be > entry (adjusted to entry*1.05 if below)
Target capped at ±30% from entry (no moonshot hallucinations)
Stop-loss max 15% distance from entry
Confidence clamped to 10-95 range
Horizon days clamped to 1-90 range
Risk/reward ratio computed from validated values
_sf() sanitizer replaces NaN/Inf with default, rounds to 2 decimals
All return_pct values sanitized before metrics computation
data_quality field added with status (good/insufficient/no_data)
data_quality includes closed_count, stale_open_signals, zero_return_closed
_sanitize_dict() in signals.py for JSON-safe responses
Active signals endpoint sanitizes live_return_pct
